questions.reason:
By putting the standard angle \( \theta = 45^\circ \): 
\( \cot 45^\circ = 1 \), \( \csc 45^\circ = \sqrt{2} \), \( \tan 45^\circ = 1 \), \( \sec 45^\circ = \sqrt{2} \). 
The expression becomes: \( (1 + 1 - \sqrt{2})(1 + 1 + \sqrt{2}) = (2 - \sqrt{2})(2 + \sqrt{2}) \). 
Using \( (a - b)(a + b) = a^2 - b^2 \): \( 2^2 - (\sqrt{2})^2 = 4 - 2 = 2 \).

questions.prompt: If \( \tan 2\theta \cdot \tan 4\theta = 1 \), then what is the value of \( \tan 3\theta \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan 2\theta \cdot \tan 4\theta = 1 \) तो \( \tan 3\theta \) का मान क्या होगा-
questions.reason:
If \( \tan A \cdot \tan B = 1 \), then \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
Here, \( 2\theta + 4\theta = 90^\circ \implies 6\theta = 90^\circ \implies \theta = 15^\circ \). 
We need to find \( \tan 3\theta = \tan(3 \times 15^\circ) = \tan 45^\circ = 1 \).
questions.reason_hi:
यदि \( \tan A \cdot \tan B = 1 \) हो, तो \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
यहाँ, \( 2\theta + 4\theta = 90^\circ \implies 6\theta = 90^\circ \implies \theta = 15^\circ \)। 
हमें \( \tan 3\theta = \tan(3 \times 15^\circ) = \tan 45^\circ = 1 \) ज्ञात करना है।

questions.prompt: If \( \sin(x + y) = \cos[3(x + y)] \), then what is the value of \( \tan[2(x + y)] \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \sin(x + y) = \cos[3(x + y)] \) हो तो \( \tan[2(x + y)] \) का मान क्या होगा-
questions.reason:
When \( \sin A = \cos B \), then \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
Therefore, \( (x + y) + 3(x + y) = 90^\circ \implies 4(x + y) = 90^\circ \implies 2(x + y) = 45^\circ \). 
We need to find \( \tan[2(x + y)] = \tan 45^\circ = 1 \).
questions.reason_hi:
जब \( \sin A = \cos B \) होता है, तब \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
अतः, \( (x + y) + 3(x + y) = 90^\circ \implies 4(x + y) = 90^\circ \implies 2(x + y) = 45^\circ \)। 
हमें \( \tan[2(x + y)] = \tan 45^\circ = 1 \) ज्ञात करना है।

questions.prompt: If \( \tan(x + y) \tan(x - y) = 1 \), then what is the value of \( \tan\left(\frac{2x}{3}\right) \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan(x + y) \tan(x - y) = 1 \) हो तो \( \tan\left(\frac{2x}{3}\right) \) का मान क्या होगा?
questions.reason:
If \( \tan A \cdot \tan B = 1 \), then \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
So, \( (x + y) + (x - y) = 90^\circ \implies 2x = 90^\circ \implies x = 45^\circ \). 
We need \( \tan\left(\frac{2x}{3}\right) = \tan\left(\frac{2 \times 45^\circ}{3}\right) = \tan\left(\frac{90^\circ}{3}\right) = \tan 30^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \).
questions.reason_hi:
यदि \( \tan A \cdot \tan B = 1 \) हो, तो \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
अतः, \( (x + y) + (x - y) = 90^\circ \implies 2x = 90^\circ \implies x = 45^\circ \)। 
हमें \( \tan\left(\frac{2x}{3}\right) = \tan\left(\frac{2 \times 45^\circ}{3}\right) = \tan\left(\frac{90^\circ}{3}\right) = \tan 30^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \) ज्ञात करना है।

questions.prompt: If \( \tan(2\theta + 45^\circ) = \cot 3\theta \), where \( (2\theta + 45^\circ) \) and \( 3\theta \) are acute angles, then what is the value of \( \theta \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan(2\theta + 45^\circ) = \cot 3\theta \), जहाँ \( (2\theta + 45^\circ) \) और \( 3\theta \) न्यूनकोण हैं, तो \( \theta \) का मान है-
questions.reason:
When \( \tan A = \cot B \), then \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
Therefore, \( (2\theta + 45^\circ) + 3\theta = 90^\circ \implies 5\theta + 45^\circ = 90^\circ \implies 5\theta = 45^\circ \implies \theta = 9^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
जब \( \tan A = \cot B \) होता है, तब \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
अतः, \( (2\theta + 45^\circ) + 3\theta = 90^\circ \implies 5\theta + 45^\circ = 90^\circ \implies 5\theta = 45^\circ \implies \theta = 9^\circ \)।

questions.prompt: If \( \sec(7\theta + 28^\circ) = \csc(30^\circ - 3\theta) \), then what will be the value of \( \theta \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \sec(7\theta + 28^\circ) = \csc(30^\circ - 3\theta) \) हो तो \( \theta \) का मान कितना होगा-
questions.reason:
When \( \sec A = \csc B \), then \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
Therefore, \( (7\theta + 28^\circ) + (30^\circ - 3\theta) = 90^\circ \implies 4\theta + 58^\circ = 90^\circ \implies 4\theta = 32^\circ \implies \theta = 8^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
जब \( \sec A = \csc B \) होता है, तब \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
अतः, \( (7\theta + 28^\circ) + (30^\circ - 3\theta) = 90^\circ \implies 4\theta + 58^\circ = 90^\circ \implies 4\theta = 32^\circ \implies \theta = 8^\circ \)।

questions.prompt: If \( x, y \) are acute angles \( (0^\circ < x + y < 90^\circ) \) and \( \sin(2x - 20^\circ) = \cos(2y + 20^\circ) \), then the value of \( \tan(x + y) \) is-
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( x, y \) न्यून कोण \( (0^\circ < x + y < 90^\circ) \) और \( \sin(2x - 20^\circ) = \cos(2y + 20^\circ) \) तो \( \tan(x + y) \) का मान है-
questions.reason:
When \( \sin A = \cos B \), \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
So, \( (2x - 20^\circ) + (2y + 20^\circ) = 90^\circ \implies 2x + 2y = 90^\circ \implies x + y = 45^\circ \). 
We need \( \tan(x + y) = \tan 45^\circ = 1 \).
questions.reason_hi:
जब \( \sin A = \cos B \) होता है, \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
अतः, \( (2x - 20^\circ) + (2y + 20^\circ) = 90^\circ \implies 2x + 2y = 90^\circ \implies x + y = 45^\circ \)। 
हमें \( \tan(x + y) = \tan 45^\circ = 1 \) ज्ञात करना है।

questions.prompt: If \( 0 < x < \frac{\pi}{2} \) and \( \sec x = \csc y \), then what is the value of \( \sin(x + y) \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( 0 < x < \frac{\pi}{2} \) तथा \( \sec x = \csc y \) हो तो \( \sin(x + y) \) कितना होगा?
questions.reason:
When \( \sec x = \csc y \), then \( x + y = 90^\circ \). 
We need to find \( \sin(x + y) = \sin 90^\circ = 1 \).
questions.reason_hi:
जब \( \sec x = \csc y \) होता है, तब \( x + y = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
हमें \( \sin(x + y) = \sin 90^\circ = 1 \) ज्ञात करना है।

questions.prompt: If \( \csc 70^\circ = \sec x \), then what will be the value of \( x \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \csc 70^\circ = \sec x \) तो \( x \) का मान क्या होगा-
questions.reason:
Since \( \csc A = \sec B \), \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
So, \( 70^\circ + x = 90^\circ \implies x = 20^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \csc A = \sec B \) होने पर \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
अतः, \( 70^\circ + x = 90^\circ \implies x = 20^\circ \)।

questions.prompt: If \( \theta \) is a positive acute angle, and \( \tan 2\theta \cdot \tan 3\theta = 1 \), then what will be the value of \( (2 \cos^2\left(\frac{5\theta}{2}\right) - 1) \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \theta \) एक धनात्मक न्यूनकोण है, और \( \tan 2\theta \cdot \tan 3\theta = 1 \) हो तो \( (2 \cos^2\left(\frac{5\theta}{2}\right) - 1) \) का मान कितना होगा-
questions.reason:
If \( \tan A \cdot \tan B = 1 \), then \( A + B = 90^\circ \). 
Here, \( 2\theta + 3\theta = 90^\circ \implies 5\theta = 90^\circ \implies \theta = 18^\circ \). 
We need to find \( 2 \cos^2\left(\frac{5\theta}{2}\right) - 1 \). Substitute \( 5\theta = 90^\circ \), so it becomes \( 2 \cos^2(45^\circ) - 1 = 2\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 - 1 = 2\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) - 1 = 1 - 1 = 0 \).
questions.reason_hi:
यदि \( \tan A \cdot \tan B = 1 \) हो, तो \( A + B = 90^\circ \) होता है। 
यहाँ, \( 2\theta + 3\theta = 90^\circ \implies 5\theta = 90^\circ \implies \theta = 18^\circ \)। 
हमें \( 2 \cos^2\left(\frac{5\theta}{2}\right) - 1 \) ज्ञात करना है। \( 5\theta = 90^\circ \) रखने पर यह \( 2 \cos^2(45^\circ) - 1 = 2\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 - 1 = 2\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) - 1 = 1 - 1 = 0 \) हो जाता है।

questions.reason:
If \( \sin\theta = \cos\theta \), dividing by \( \cos\theta \) gives \( \tan\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 45^\circ \). 
Now substitute \( \theta = 45^\circ \): \( 2 \tan^2(45^\circ) + \sin^2(45^\circ) - 1 = 2(1)^2 + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 - 1 = 2(1) + \frac{1}{2} - 1 = 2 + 0.5 - 1 = 1.5 = \frac{3}{2} \).
questions.reason_hi:
यदि \( \sin\theta = \cos\theta \), \( \cos\theta \) से भाग देने पर \( \tan\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 45^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है। 
अब \( \theta = 45^\circ \) रखने पर: \( 2 \tan^2(45^\circ) + \sin^2(45^\circ) - 1 = 2(1)^2 + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 - 1 = 2(1) + \frac{1}{2} - 1 = 2 + 0.5 - 1 = 1.5 = \frac{3}{2} \)।

questions.reason:
The equation \( \tan\theta + \cot\theta = 2 \) is in the form \( x + \frac{1}{x} = 2 \), which implies \( x = 1 \). Therefore, \( \tan\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 45^\circ \) and \( \cot\theta = 1 \). 
Any power of 1 is 1, so \( \tan^7(45^\circ) + \cot^7(45^\circ) = 1^7 + 1^7 = 1 + 1 = 2 \).
questions.reason_hi:
समीकरण \( \tan\theta + \cot\theta = 2 \), \( x + \frac{1}{x} = 2 \) के रूप में है, जिसका अर्थ है \( x = 1 \)। अतः, \( \tan\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 45^\circ \) और \( \cot\theta = 1 \)। 
1 की कोई भी घात 1 होती है, इसलिए \( \tan^7(45^\circ) + \cot^7(45^\circ) = 1^7 + 1^7 = 1 + 1 = 2 \)।

questions.reason:
Since \( \csc\theta = \frac{1}{\sin\theta} \), the equation is essentially \( (x)^7 + \left(\frac{1}{x}\right)^7 = 2 \). This is only possible if the base value is 1. Thus, \( \sin\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 90^\circ \). 
Therefore, \( \sin^{99}(90^\circ) + \csc^{99}(90^\circ) = 1^{99} + 1^{99} = 1 + 1 = 2 \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \csc\theta = \frac{1}{\sin\theta} \) होता है, समीकरण मूल रूप से \( (x)^7 + \left(\frac{1}{x}\right)^7 = 2 \) है। यह तभी संभव है जब आधार मान 1 हो। अतः, \( \sin\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 90^\circ \)। 
इसलिए, \( \sin^{99}(90^\circ) + \csc^{99}(90^\circ) = 1^{99} + 1^{99} = 1 + 1 = 2 \) होगा।

questions.reason:
Since \( \sec\theta = \frac{1}{\cos\theta} \), this follows the pattern \( x^n + \frac{1}{x^n} = 2 \), which means \( x = 1 \). Therefore, \( \cos\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 0^\circ \). 
For any power, \( \cos^{100}(0^\circ) + \sec^{100}(0^\circ) = 1^{100} + 1^{100} = 1 + 1 = 2 \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \sec\theta = \frac{1}{\cos\theta} \) है, यह \( x^n + \frac{1}{x^n} = 2 \) के पैटर्न का अनुसरण करता है, जिसका अर्थ \( x = 1 \) है। अतः, \( \cos\theta = 1 \implies \theta = 0^\circ \)। 
किसी भी घात के लिए, \( \cos^{100}(0^\circ) + \sec^{100}(0^\circ) = 1^{100} + 1^{100} = 1 + 1 = 2 \) होगा।
